facebook.caption:
4.6 stars. 546 reviews. At a beach bistro most tourists never find.

The Beach Bistro sits right on Khu Bãi Dài, Gành Dầu, Phú Quốc. Far from the resort strip. The kind of place that earns its rating quietly.

546 people took the time to rate it. That number means something.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Plates hitting the table at The Beach Bistro, Gành Dầu. 546 reviews worth of reasons to drive north. Watch till the end.

instagram.caption:
4.6 stars. 546 reviews. Khu Bãi Dài, Gành Dầu, Phú Quốc.
